title: centaurea paniculata subsp. maremmana
intro: Centaurea paniculata subsp. maremmana, also known as Maremma knapweed, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its flavonoids and terpenoids content. The health benefits of Centaurea paniculata subsp. maremmana include reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
